name: terminal_opencode_prompt

setup.description: Terminal is open with OpenCode session active

command: 현재 OpenCode 프롬프트에 'hello world를 출력하는 파이썬 코드 작성해줘'라고 입력하고 실행해줘
successPrompt: Verify that the prompt input area was selected, the request text was entered, and submitted. Look for signs that the prompt was consumed: new output block, prompt deactivation, spinner/streaming, or input line reset.
